title: Chapter 86
content:
Chapter 86: The Sexual Circumstances of a 30-Something Mother Dog Wife

Is her husband still alive?

When was the last time she had sex?

Is she sexually frustrated?

Even though my cock was sucked dry by Iferasuki, the faint scent of remaining semen inside the shaft must be seducing this dog girl with her superior sense of smell.

I can do this.

If this were an erotic manga, this would be the moment after being invited into the room of the big-breasted married woman next door. It’s right after she rubs her cheek against the massive bulge in your jeans or you grope her defenseless huge tits from behind and she says, "Y-you mustn’t... (translation: It’s been so long since I’ve had sex. I’m so excited)."

Even if her husband or daughter came home, the caressing would start secretly under the half-height partition separating the kitchen and living room.

In other words, if it were just the two of us in an erotic manga, sex would be guaranteed on the next page.

But right now, there are five beastmen inside the room, including Letree’s daughter. Outside, there are three humans, eleven beastmen, one dragon person, and one elf. There’s no telling when any of them might show up.

Ethically, having sex in this situation is wrong.

However, my cock is being rubbed by a big-breasted lewd married woman, so it stays fully erect without softening. Honestly, I’m already reloaded and ready for round two.

I don’t know if she’s a married woman or a widow, but I’d love to experience an adult woman’s technique...

Unlike Iferasuki, who only wants to drink semen, Letree gives off the feeling that she would give me a proper blowjob meant to pleasure me.

I have a feeling that Letree’s blowjob lecture is about to begin and all the dog girls will end up sucking me.

In fact, I’m starting to suspect that Letree was the one who ordered the dog girls to strip me and lick my whole body.

An erotic party that takes advantage of the beastmen’s characteristically low sexual morals is about to begin.

But...

This is the kitchen/dining area in the morning. There’s no telling when Rafilia or the macho guys might come in.

I have to hold back.

"Sorry. I just lost my balance."

With great reluctance, I take my long robe from Letree and quickly put it on.

Good. The dog girls are still looking at the door, so it seems no one except Letree saw my cock.

"What a shame. It’s been so long since I lost my husband, so I just..."

Letree sighs regretfully. Every gesture is full of sensuality. She’s overflowing with mature charm.

I see. She’s a widow. A widow who got excited after seeing a man’s cock for the first time in a long while.

If her husband were alive it would be NTR, but there’s no fear of that. I understand...

I’ve mainly used lesbian anal videos as my staple fap material, so the married woman genre is still unexplored territory for me.

I see. Yeah, I see... The nape of her neck, collarbones, and the back of her neck give off a thick adult fragrance that innocent girls can’t produce.

"I think a parent-child bowl would be nice too, but I hesitate in this situation."

"Parent-child bowl" is a sexual slang term for having sex with both mother and daughter at the same time. In other words, alternating between Letree’s loose 30-year-old pussy and Petit Letree’s tight 12-year-old pussy.

A common pattern is: the daughter appears while the protagonist is having sex with the mother, then he has sex with the daughter too. Once the protagonist is satisfied, the mother says, "I’m not satisfied yet," and they go into round three. They overlap mother and daughter, alternating between the loose pussy and the tight pussy.

I’m embarrassed to say this is based on my own research, but parent-child bowl stories appear more often in fantasy anthologies than in works set in the real world. Probably because, given the nature of the fetish, setting the mother around 30 makes the daughter too loli and creates a sense of immorality, so it’s easier to construct the story in a lawless other world. Also, beastmen seem to have low sexual morals, so they might be open to parent-child play. In works set in Japan, they often incorporate fantasy elements like vampire heroines, crane-returning-a-favor motifs, or foxes disguised as humans whose true forms are quickly revealed. It makes it easier to justify why the mother offers her daughter.

Additionally, parent-child bowl works have a high rate of anal sex. Usually, the mother gets her ass fucked first. Then it branches into the mother recommending the protagonist enjoy her daughter’s ass, or the daughter becoming jealous of her mother’s anal fucking and begging the protagonist herself.

This is dangerous. Just remembering erotic manga is making me want to try parent-child bowl. However, the biggest problem is whether Letree is the kind of mother who would offer her daughter’s chastity to me.

Realistically, since this isn’t an erotic manga, there’s no mother who would say "Please ravish my daughter." But from a dog girl perspective, they might want strong male sperm, or all females might obey the pack boss, so there’s a possibility that parent-child bowl would be acceptable for some reason.

"Can I go for the parent-child bowl...?"

"Parent-child bowl?"

"Um..."

"There’s a dish from my hometown called parent-child bowl. Huh?"

I sense someone approaching the hut door. Because I was hesitating indecisively, I’ve lost not only the chance for parent-child bowl but even the chance to do anything erotic with Letree.

Click.

"Good morning."

Rafilia opens the door and enters. The two macho men are behind her, so they were probably helping with the morning cleaning.

I see. Even after I used the fake distraction on the door, the other dog girls kept staring at it because they could smell or sense Rafilia and the others approaching.

"Good morn—ah... ing."

My voice cracked.

That’s because while I was replying to Rafilia, Letree slipped her hand through the gap in my robe and gently grabbed the base of my cock and my balls. She’s probably scooping my balls with her palm while hooking her thumb around the root of the shaft.

What the hell is this woman doing? We were clearly in the "no sex right now" flow.

Does she understand? All the sensible people currently in the church are gathered right here.

Estimated Common Sense Levels

High: Rafilia > Unbreachable Wall > Me, Two Macho Men

Normal: Letree (↓ Just dropped one rank below expectations)

Low: Elf > Lucia > Capybara Girls > Iferasuki

"Doll-san. Uda-san. Could you please prepare the tables?"

"Leave it to us!"

"Of course. It’s the ones along this wall, right?"

"Yes. Please assemble them."

Rafilia and the others, completely unaware that a 30-year-old mother with childbirth experience is currently gripping my cock, enter the room and begin preparing breakfast.

Letree gently rocks the hand holding my balls as if she were tasting wine, narrowing her eyes in pleasure.
